content.rendered:
[vc_row][vc_column][vc_empty_space height=”50px” el_class=”height30″][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row el_class=”flexrow”][vc_column width=”1/4″ el_class=”flextwo gt-custom-sidebar-column”][vc_widget_sidebar sidebar_id=”honeymoon-package-international-sidebar”][/vc_column][vc_column width=”3/4″ el_class=”second-div-text flexone”][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Krabi, a tiny island in Southern Thailand, is a quieter getaway for romantic couples looking for a peaceful vacation. Unlike some of Thailand’s popular destinations like Phuket and Phi Phi Islands, Krabi has the perfect romantic ambiance. The serene beaches, clear waters, beautiful limestone cliffs, and exquisite flora will surely set your heart on fire. At ATW Travels, we offer a range of exciting Krabi honeymoon packages that are right for your budget and travel style.

Call us to choose from the best Krabi honeymoon tour packages if your idea of a romantic escapade includes strolling along pristine beaches and exploring the depths of the beautiful Andaman Sea. From windsurfing and kite surfing to kayaking and swimming, there are plenty of water sports and activities.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Make Sure These Places Are Included in Your Romantic Krabi Honeymoon Tour Package” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Ao Nang” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Ao Nang is the central tourist spot in Krabi, with plenty of accommodation options across varied budgets. It has a buzzing nightlife and plenty of restaurants as well. If you plan to go island hopping, Ao Nang is the best base.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_single_image image=”26276″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Railay Beach” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

This is a picturesque golden beach with breathtaking limestone cliffs by sparkling blue waters that are a delight to the eyes. The Railay Peninsula has two of the best beaches in the province, viz., Phra Nang Beach and West Railay Beach.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Nopparat Thara & Klong Haeng” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Nopparat Thara is a long beach adjacent to Ao Nang and is split into two halves, separated by a river and a pier. The beach is locally called Klong Haeng beach. Klong Haeng is also the name of the village that’s close to the beach. Similarly, Nopparat Thara is also the name of the local marine national park that is home to rare types of corals and marine animals.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Klong Muang and Tupkaek” font_container=”tag:h3|text_align:left” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Klong Muang is a beautiful beach that’s perfect for couples to relax and enjoy some quiet time. This place is ideal for travellers looking for premium accommodation and dining options. It’s an excellent place for shopping as well.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_single_image image=”26278″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”How To Reach Krabi and Get Around the Place?” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Transportation and connectivity are excellent in Thailand. Bangkok is the nearest international airport that connects to Krabi. You can take a flight, bus or train to reach Krabi once you get to Bangkok. Krabi is a well-connected town with plenty of buses and bright tuk-tuks operating within the city.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”The Best Season to Book Krabi Trip Package for Couples” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Krabi is a great place to travel any time, but November to March are dry months and typically peak tourist season. But if you are looking for affordable Krabi honeymoon packages, we suggest booking one during the off-season, i.e., from June to September, when the weather is hot and humid, but prices are at an all-time low. April and May are peak summer months and the perfect time to witness Songkran, the Thai water festival, and the start of the Buddhist New Year.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”The Best Honeymoon Resorts in Krabi” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

ATW Travels has one of the best networks in the travel and tourism industry. We have partnered with the best hotels and resorts across Thailand to offer world-class accommodation at the best possible prices. Our Krabi honeymoon packages offer the best deals at the most exotic resorts on the island.

Some of the best luxury resorts in Krabi include:

  • Rayavadee Resort- Railay Beach
  • Phulay Bay, A Ritz-Carlton Reserve
  • Nakamanda Resort and Spa
  • Beyond Resort Krabi
  • Islanda Hideaway Resort
  • Pakasai Resort

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_single_image image=”26279″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Activities that are Part of Your Krabi Honeymoon Packages” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

There are plenty of activities that couples can enjoy in Krabi. When speaking to your ATW Travels tour planner, make sure the following activities are included in your Krabi honeymoon package

  • Sunset at Ao Nang Beach
  • Experiencing adventure activities at the Railay Beach
  • Kayaking along the mangroves around Krabi
  • Swimming in the hot springs of Klong Thom
  • Swimming on the Emerald Pool or Sa Morakot at the Thung Teao Forest Natural Park.
  • Visiting the Tiger Cave Temple, which is 278 meters high, after ascending 1237 steps to witness a gorgeous view of the rainforest and the golden buddha statue that adorns the summit.
  • Learning scuba diving to dive into the deep blue sea and discover the mesmerizing marine life and beautiful reefs.
  • Rejuvenating the inner self with a therapeutic Thai couple massage

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner full_width=”stretch_row_content_no_spaces” css=”.vc_custom_1645675083319{margin-bottom: 20px !important;padding-top: 40px !important;padding-bottom: 40px !important;background-color: #1a2b48 !important;}” el_id=”mobileshoecontact” el_class=”show-mobile”][vc_column_inner el_class=”whitecontent” width=”1/2″][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1646220202715{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”]

[/vc_column_text][vc_icon icon_fontawesome=”fas fa-phone” background_style=”rounded” size=”xs” align=”center” el_class=”gthomeicon” css=”.vc_custom_1643786099141{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”][vc_column_text]

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner el_class=”whitecontent” width=”1/2″ css=”.vc_custom_1644654313324{border-left-width: 1px !important;border-left-color: #ffffff !important;border-left-style: solid !important;}”][vc_column_text css=”.vc_custom_1653552448221{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}”]

Book Your Dream Vacay Today!

[/vc_column_text]

[/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”What to Eat in Krabi” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Pad Thai is a staple in Krabi, but there are so many other lip-smacking delights that you can try. Some of the local delicacies include:

  • Hot & spicy fishcakes with a spicy chutney called chili jam
  • Raw green mango salad
  • Yellow chicken biryani called Khao Mok Gai- a local preparation
  • Grilled squid skewers
  • Noodle salad dressed in fish curry called Khanom jeen
  • Roti pancakes
  • Black grass jelly or shaved ice desserts
  • Thai coconut puddings
  • Mango and sticky rice

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_single_image image=”26280″ img_size=”full” alignment=”center”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_custom_heading text=”Shopping Destinations Included in Krabi Honeymoon Packages” use_theme_fonts=”yes”][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]

Krabi is the best place for shopping thanks to the many street markets all over the city. Some of the shopping destinations included in your Krabi honeymoon package include:

  • Krabi Town Walking Street
  • Ao Nang Walking Street
  • Vogue Department Store
  • Klong Muang Plaza
  • Big C Mall
  • Outlet Village
  • Sabai Ba Bar & Souvenirs
  • Chock Dee Handmade Jewellery Shop
  • Ban Na Teen Cultural Centre

At ATW Travels, we’ve put together a few Krabi honeymoon packages that include some of the best tourist attractions and activities you are sure to enjoy with your loved one. Follow our Instagram profile to know about the latest offers and discounts.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner el_class=”removepadding”][vc_column_inner][vc_column_text]
